# Codebase Report: Paraşüt API V4 Documentation
Generated: 2026-04-04T22:39:55

## Summary

Paraşüt API V4 is a JSONAPI-compliant REST API. Authentication is OAuth2 (password grant or authorization_code). All endpoints are under `https://api.parasut.com/v4/{company_id}/`. Rate limit: 10 requests per 10 seconds.

---

## 1. Authentication

**Type:** OAuth2  
**Token URL:** `https://api.parasut.com/oauth/token`  
**Header format:** `Authorization: Bearer {access_token}`  
**Token expiry:** 2 hours  
**Content-Type required:** `application/json` or `application/vnd.api+json`

### Method A: Password Grant (simpler, for direct integrations)

```bash
curl -F grant_type=password \
  -F client_id=CLIENT_ID \
  -F client_secret=CLIENT_SECRET \
  -F username=YOUREMAIL \
  -F password=YOURPASSWORD \
  -F redirect_uri=urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob \
  -X POST https://api.parasut.com/oauth/token
```

### Method B: Authorization Code Grant (for user-facing OAuth flow)

```
GET https://api.parasut.com/oauth/authorize?client_id=CLIENT_ID&redirect_uri=REDIRECT_URL&response_type=code

POST https://api.parasut.com/oauth/token
  grant_type=authorization_code
  client_id=CLIENT_ID
  client_secret=CLIENT_SECRET
  code=RETURNED_CODE
  redirect_uri=REDIRECT_URL
```

### Token Response

```json
{
  "access_token": "XYZXYZXYZ",
  "token_type": "bearer",
  "expires_in": 7200,
  "refresh_token": "ABCABCABC"
}
```

### Refresh Token

```bash
curl -F grant_type=refresh_token \
  -F client_id=CLIENT_ID \
  -F client_secret=CLIENT_SECRET \
  -F refresh_token=REFRESH_TOKEN \
  -X POST https://api.parasut.com/oauth/token
```

> NOTE: Refreshing gives a NEW refresh_token. Always store the latest one.  
> CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET obtained from destek@parasut.com

---

## 2. API Base URL & Versioning

```
Base URL:     https://api.parasut.com
Version path: /v4
Full base:    https://api.parasut.com/v4/{company_id}
```

`company_id` = your company's numeric ID in Paraşüt database (e.g., `115`).

Example: `GET https://api.parasut.com/v4/115/contacts`

---

## 3. Create Contact (Müşteri/Cari)

**Endpoint:** `POST /v4/{company_id}/contacts`

### Required Fields

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `name` | string | Müşteri/tedarikçi ismi |
| `account_type` | string | `customer` or `supplier` |

### Optional Fields

| Field | Type | Values / Notes |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `contact_type` | string | `person` or `company` |
| `email` | string | E-posta |
| `tax_office` | string | Vergi dairesi |
| `tax_number` | string | Vergi numarası / TC kimlik no |
| `address` | string | Adres |
| `district` | string | İlçe |
| `city` | string | İl |
| `postal_code` | string | Posta kodu |
| `country` | string | Ülke |
| `phone` | string | Telefon |
| `fax` | string | Faks |
| `iban` | string | IBAN |
| `is_abroad` | boolean | Yurt dışı mı |

### Request Body

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "contacts",
    "attributes": {
      "name": "Acme Ltd.",
      "account_type": "customer",
      "contact_type": "company",
      "email": "billing@acme.com",
      "tax_office": "Kadıköy",
      "tax_number": "1234567890",
      "address": "Bağdat Cad. No:1",
      "city": "İstanbul",
      "phone": "02161234567"
    }
  }
}
```

### Response: 201 Created → includes `id` of the new contact

---

## 4. Create Sales Invoice (Satış Faturası)

**Endpoint:** `POST /v4/{company_id}/sales_invoices`

### Required Fields (attributes)

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `item_type` | string | `invoice`, `export`, `estimate`, `cancelled`, `recurring_invoice`, `recurring_estimate`, `recurring_export`, `refund` |
| `issue_date` | string | Düzenleme tarihi (ISO date: `2024-01-15`) |

### Optional Attributes

| Field | Type | Values / Notes |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `description` | string | Fatura açıklaması |
| `due_date` | string | Son tahsilat tarihi |
| `invoice_series` | string | Fatura seri |
| `invoice_id` | integer | Fatura sıra |
| `currency` | string | `TRL`, `USD`, `EUR`, `GBP` |
| `exchange_rate` | number | Döviz kuru |
| `billing_address` | string | |
| `billing_postal_code` | string | |
| `billing_phone` | string | |
| `tax_office` | string | Müşteri vergi dairesi |
| `tax_number` | string | Müşteri vergi numarası |
| `city` | string | |
| `country` | string | |
| `is_abroad` | boolean | |
| `order_no` | string | Sipariş no |
| `order_date` | string | Sipariş tarihi |
| `invoice_discount_type` | string | `percentage` or `amount` |
| `invoice_discount` | number | |
| `cash_sale` | boolean | Peşin satış |
| `invoice_note` | string | Fatura notu |
| `payment_account_id` | number | Peşin fatura ödeme hesabı |
| `payment_date` | string | Peşin fatura ödeme tarihi |

### Relationships

| Relationship | Required | Notes |
|--------------|----------|-------|
| `contact` | YES | Müşteri ID |
| `details` | YES (at least 1) | Fatura kalemleri (array) |
| `category` | No | item_categories ID |
| `tags` | No | tags ID array |
| `sales_offer` | No | sales_offers ID |

### Full Request Body Example

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "sales_invoices",
    "attributes": {
      "item_type": "invoice",
      "issue_date": "2024-01-15",
      "due_date": "2024-02-15",
      "currency": "TRL",
      "description": "Ocak 2024 hizmet bedeli"
    },
    "relationships": {
      "contact": {
        "data": {
          "id": "12345",
          "type": "contacts"
        }
      },
      "details": {
        "data": [
          {
            "type": "sales_invoice_details",
            "attributes": {
              "quantity": 2,
              "unit_price": 500.00,
              "vat_rate": 20,
              "discount_type": "percentage",
              "discount_value": 10,
              "description": "Web tasarım hizmeti"
            },
            "relationships": {
              "product": {
                "data": {
                  "id": "99999",
                  "type": "products"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
```

> IMPORTANT: When creating, `data.id` must be empty/omitted.  
> The `details[].id` must also be empty (new items).  
> But `relationships.contact.data.id` MUST be populated with an existing contact ID.

---

## 5. Invoice Line Items (Fatura Kalemleri)

Line items go inside `relationships.details.data[]`. Each item:

### Required Fields

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `quantity` | number | Miktar |
| `unit_price` | number | Birim fiyatı |
| `vat_rate` | number | KDV oranı (e.g., 20 for %20) |

### Optional Fields

| Field | Type | Values / Notes |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `description` | string | Açıklama |
| `discount_type` | string | `percentage` or `amount` |
| `discount_value` | number | İndirim değeri |
| `vat_withholding_rate` | number | Tevkifat oranı |
| `excise_duty_type` | string | `percentage` or `amount` |
| `excise_duty_value` | number | ÖTV değeri |
| `communications_tax_rate` | number | ÖİV oranı |
| `delivery_method` | string | `CFR`, `CIF`, `CIP`, `CPT`, `DAF`, `DAP`, `DPU`, `DDP`, `DDU`, `DEQ`, `DES`, `EXW`, `FAS`, `FCA`, `FOB` |
| `shipping_method` | string | Denizyolu, Demiryolu, Karayolu, Havayolu, etc. |

### Detail Relationships

```json
"relationships": {
  "product": {
    "data": { "id": "PRODUCT_ID", "type": "products" }
  },
  "warehouse": {
    "data": { "id": "WAREHOUSE_ID", "type": "warehouses" }
  }
}
```

---

## 6. Create Product (Ürün/Hizmet)

**Endpoint:** `POST /v4/{company_id}/products`

### Required Fields

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `name` | string | Ürün/hizmet ismi |

### Optional Fields

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `code` | string | Ürün/hizmet kodu |
| `vat_rate` | number | KDV oranı |
| `list_price` | number | Satış fiyatı |
| `currency` | string | Satış döviz |
| `buying_price` | number | Alış fiyatı |
| `buying_currency` | string | Alış döviz |
| `unit` | string | Birim (adet, kg, m, etc.) |
| `barcode` | string | Barkod |
| `gtip` | string | GTIP kodu |
| `inventory_tracking` | boolean | Stok takibi |
| `initial_stock_count` | number | Başlangıç stok miktarı |

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "products",
    "attributes": {
      "name": "Web Tasarım Hizmeti",
      "code": "SRV-001",
      "vat_rate": 20,
      "list_price": 500.00,
      "currency": "TRL",
      "unit": "Saat"
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 7. Add Payment to Invoice

**Endpoint:** `POST /v4/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}/payments`

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "payments",
    "attributes": {
      "description": "Ocak tahsilatı",
      "account_id": 55,
      "date": "2024-01-20",
      "amount": 1000.00
    }
  }
}
```

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `account_id` | integer | Kasa veya banka hesabı ID |
| `date` | string | Tahsilat tarihi |
| `amount` | number | Tutar |
| `description` | string | Açıklama |
| `exchange_rate` | number | Farklı döviz kurunda ise |

---

## 8. List/Search Endpoints

### List Contacts

```
GET /v4/{company_id}/contacts
  ?filter[name]=Acme
  ?filter[tax_number]=1234567890
  ?filter[email]=billing@acme.com
  ?filter[account_type]=customer
  ?page[number]=1&page[size]=25
  ?sort=name
```

### List Products

```
GET /v4/{company_id}/products
  ?filter[name]=Web
  ?filter[code]=SRV-001
  ?page[number]=1&page[size]=25
```

### List Sales Invoices

```
GET /v4/{company_id}/sales_invoices
  ?include=contact,details,payments
```

---

## 9. Key Endpoints Summary

| Action | Method | Endpoint |
|--------|--------|----------|
| Get my user info | GET | `/me` |
| List contacts | GET | `/{company_id}/contacts` |
| Create contact | POST | `/{company_id}/contacts` |
| Get contact | GET | `/{company_id}/contacts/{id}` |
| Update contact | PUT | `/{company_id}/contacts/{id}` |
| List products | GET | `/{company_id}/products` |
| Create product | POST | `/{company_id}/products` |
| List invoices | GET | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices` |
| Create invoice | POST | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices` |
| Get invoice | GET | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}` |
| Update invoice | PUT | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}` |
| Delete invoice | DELETE | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}` |
| Cancel invoice | DELETE | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}/cancel` |
| Add payment | POST | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}/payments` |
| Archive invoice | PATCH | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}/archive` |
| Convert to invoice | PATCH | `/{company_id}/sales_invoices/{id}/convert_to_invoice` |
| Create e-Invoice | POST | `/{company_id}/e_invoices` |
| Create e-Archive | POST | `/{company_id}/e_archives` |

---

## 10. Important Notes

1. **JSONAPI format**: All requests/responses follow JSONAPI spec. Data is always wrapped in `{ "data": { "type": "...", "attributes": {...}, "relationships": {...} } }`
2. **IDs are strings** in request bodies, not integers.
3. **New records**: Leave `data.id` empty (or omit). Relationship IDs must be provided.
4. **Rate limit**: 10 requests / 10 seconds.
5. **Credentials**: CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET must be requested from destek@parasut.com.
6. **e-Invoice flow**: After creating a sales_invoice, must separately create e_invoice or e_archive to "legalize" it. This is async — returns a trackable_job ID.

---

## Architecture Flow for Invoice Creation

```
1. GET /oauth/token (password grant) → access_token

2. POST /contacts → contact_id  (if customer doesn't exist yet)
   OR GET /contacts?filter[name]=X → find existing contact_id

3. POST /products → product_id  (if product doesn't exist yet)
   OR GET /products?filter[name]=X → find existing product_id

4. POST /sales_invoices
   body: {
     attributes: { item_type, issue_date, ... },
     relationships: {
       contact: { data: { id: contact_id, type: "contacts" } },
       details: [{ attributes: { quantity, unit_price, vat_rate },
                   relationships: { product: { data: { id: product_id } } } }]
     }
   }
   → invoice_id

5. (Optional) POST /sales_invoices/{invoice_id}/payments → record payment

6. (Optional) POST /e_invoices or /e_archives → legalize the invoice
```
